title: Hypixel Skyblock simple additions
description: Adds a few Skyblock textures for Hypixel
body:
Gives a new, cool look to Hypixel Skyblock, please tell me if there are bugs. It changes a hype, term, florid zombie, healing wands, and much more! I am hoping that this pack will give new life to Hypixel Skyblock.

I am slowly adding more and more to this and at the moment are frequently updating! Please tell me your ideas for what I should add! I will try to check as often as I can. Please enjoy this pack! It makes user experience much more enjoyable and fun! 
#
ENTITES
- Zombie
- Skeleton
#
ITEMS
- Wand of restoration
- Hyperion
- Terminator
- Emerald
- Skyblock menu
#
AND MORE!
#
#
[CURSEFORGE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/hypixel-skyblock-simple-additions)

# DOWNLOAD
put the file in the resource pack folder in .minecraft!
#
> This is not in use for any mods currently
Please feel free to include this though!
## DISCONTINUED
Will not be getting any future updates




**UNUSED**

```
Works on it's own, fully functional
```

### ONLY FOR 1.20.1
